cases.description: Verify "Got It" and "Don't Show Again" behavior.
steps: 1. Perform Precut_01 steps. 2. Verify warning popup appears. 3. Tap Got It. 4. Relaunch Pre-Cut. 5. Verify popup behavior according to Don't Show Again selection.
cases.expected: Popup behaves correctly and user preference is maintained.

verifications.description: Verify "Got It" and "Don't Show Again" behavior.
verifications.expected: Popup behaves correctly and user preference is maintained.

cases.description: Verify UI when gallery permission is denied.
steps: 1. Deny Photos & Videos permission from device settings. 2. Launch app. 3. Navigate to Pre-Cut Stickers.
cases.expected: Permission error screen with Open Settings is displayed. App recovers after permission is granted.

verifications.description: Verify UI when gallery permission is denied.
verifications.expected: Permission error screen with Open Settings is displayed. App recovers after permission is granted.

cases.description: Verify exit flow after editing selection.
steps: 1. Perform Precut_02 steps until Print Preview. 2. Tap Edit and make changes. 3. Tap Back. 4. Verify Save as New Photo popup. 5. Select Save to Gallery and Don't Save separately.
cases.expected: Save popup appears and selected option works correctly.

verifications.description: Verify exit flow after editing selection.
verifications.expected: Save popup appears and selected option works correctly.
